mapper.sql: id, user_id as userId, name, nickname, email, password, profile_image_url as profileImageUrl, representative_latitude as representativeLatitude, representative_longitude as representativeLongitude, representative_region_name as representativeRegionName, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt
mapper.select: select from members order by created_at desc
select from members where user_id = #{userId} and email = #{email}
select count(*) from members where user_id = #{userId}
select count(*) from members where email = #{email}
mapper.insert: insert into members (user_id, name, nickname, email, password, profile_image_url, representative_latitude, representative_longitude, representative_region_name, created_at) values (#{userId}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{password}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{representativeLatitude}, #{representativeLongitude}, #{representativeRegionName}, current_timestamp)
mapper.update: update members set name = #{name}, nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, password = #{password}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, representative_latitude = #{representativeLatitude}, representative_longitude = #{representativeLongitude}, representative_region_name = #{representativeRegionName}, updated_at = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId}
